name: Forensic Accountants
description: The most comprehensive directory of CFF- and CFE-credentialed forensic accountants, fraud investigators, and litigation support specialists in the United States.
certifications: MAFF (Master Analyst in Financial Forensics — NACVA)
cityPagePromptContext:
Forensic accountants provide litigation support, fraud investigation, and financial damages analysis for legal proceedings.
Credentialed professionals (CFF, CFE, CVA, ABV) analyze financial records,
reconstruct transactions, calculate economic damages, and testify as expert
witnesses. Trial attorneys and insurers retain them for commercial disputes,
divorce proceedings, insurance claims, embezzlement cases, and business
interruption claims. Engagement deliverables include expert reports quantifying
financial losses, identifying irregularities, and supporting or rebutting
damages claims in court.
buyerSearchContext: when building a financial damages case, investigating suspected fraud, or retaining a qualified expert witness for commercial litigation

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help trial attorneys find credentialed forensic accountants without wading through general CPAs who overstate their litigation experience — a gap he encountered when trying to source a qualified damages expert for a commercial dispute.

schema.label: State Licensed CPA
schema.scrape_hint: Look for active CPA license numbers, state board of accountancy credentials, or explicit mentions of licensure (e.g., 'Texas CPA License #12345') on homepage, bio page, or footer.

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', attorney bios, or '20+ years in forensic accounting' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Professional Certifications
schema.scrape_hint: Scan credentials sections, team bios, or logo badges for AICPA, ACFE, NACVA designations; match exact acronyms and full credential names.

schema.label: Qualified Expert Witness
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'expert witness', 'trial testimony', 'Daubert qualified', 'deposition experience', or case references listing courtroom appearances in services or bio pages.

schema.label: Independent (No Counsel Affiliation)
schema.scrape_hint: Look for statements like 'retained by both plaintiff and defense', 'neutral expert', 'court-appointed', or absence of ongoing retainer relationships with specific law firms in firm descriptions.

schema.label: Report Turnaround Time
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from service descriptions, FAQs, or engagement process sections; look for phrases like 'preliminary report in 10 business days' or 'timeline depends on document volume'.

schema.label: Practice Areas
schema.scrape_hint: Parse services menu, homepage offerings, or industry-specific pages; match keywords like 'lost profits', 'business interruption', 'marital asset tracing', 'insurance subrogation', or 'shareholder dispute'.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
